_meta.name: ALM r12 FSDP B1 unblock — libhxnccl.so + nccl_ffi wired (2026-04-20)
_meta.goal: Resolve r11 FSDP B1 (libhxnccl.so missing) so r12 multi-rank training can wire NCCL collectives without violating py-ban.

verdict_rationale: libhxnccl.so build infrastructure landed (lib/hxnccl/{hxnccl.c, CMakeLists.txt, smoke.c}), Day-2 NCCL implementation populated in self/native/hxccl_linux.c (ncclCommInitRank + ncclAllReduce + ncclBroadcast + ncclAllGather + ncclReduceScatter + ncclCommDestroy via file-based ncclUniqueId rendezvous), training/nccl_ffi.hexa rewritten to route nccl_init/shutdown/barrier/all_reduce_loss through hxnccl extern functions (single-rank smoke 8/8 PASS on Mac stub). LAYER-granularity collectives (nccl_broadcast_layer, nccl_reduce_scatter_layer) remain NCCL_TODO_RC because they need fsdp_shard.hexa to expose per-layer device pointer arrays — that is the B2 follow-up, not B1. 2-rank H100 SXM smoke deliberately deferred to avoid cost; ABI/dlopen surface verified locally to give the next session high confidence the multi-rank smoke will succeed once the pod is allocated.

files_authored.purpose: two-mode build: stub (Mac/no-NCCL) + production (-DHXNCCL_WITH_NCCL=ON, links nccl+cudart)
single-rank smoke: init(0,1) + barrier + destroy + idempotent destroy

files_modified.purpose: filled HXCCL_NCCL #ifdef branches with real ncclCommInitRank/AllReduce/Broadcast/AllGather/ReduceScatter/CommDestroy + file-based ncclUniqueId rendezvous (HXCCL_UNIQUE_ID_FILE env var, default /tmp/hxccl_uid_<world_size>)

files_modified.fix: Mac stub Family A globals now populated by hxccl_init_handle so hxnccl_world_size/rank report correct values after init_world(0,1)

B2_status_rationale: nccl_broadcast_layer / nccl_reduce_scatter_layer still return NCCL_TODO_RC for world>1 because they need fsdp_shard.hexa to expose per-layer device pointer arrays (Wq/Wk/Wv/Wo/Wff1/Wff2/ga/gf for each Qwen2DecoderLayer) and a hxnccl_broadcast_f32 loop. That wiring is fsdp_shard.hexa territory and explicitly the B2 follow-up after B1 lands. With B1 surfaced, B2 is a mechanical 2-4 hour exercise (the NCCL backend is now ready, the trainer just needs to call it).

linux_stub_compile.note: Mac clang acting as syntax checker for Linux stub branch (no __linux__ defined → runs Mac stub path; stub-only path always compiles).

linux_nccl_compile_with_mock.note: Mock cuda_runtime.h + nccl.h (matching real ABI) used for compile-only verification of the Day-2 path. Real link against libnccl.so + libcudart.so deferred to runpod build.

two_rank_h100_smoke.rationale: Requires H100 SXM 2-GPU pod. Estimated cost: $5.98/hr × 0.5h smoke = $3 (pod spin + nvcc + libhxnccl build + 2-rank init + barrier + destroy). Deferred to next session per feedback_h100_free_use (idle GPU = waste); B1 unblock target was the FFI surface, not the multi-rank live test. Confidence the live test will pass: HIGH — the file-based ncclUniqueId rendezvous is a documented NCCL pattern, the Mac stub demonstrates the ABI surface compiles + dlopens + reports correct cached state, and the Day-2 NCCL #ifdef branches mirror the standard ncclCommInitRank/AllReduce/Broadcast/CommDestroy idiom from NVIDIA's nccl-tests.

tasks: Spin runpod H100 SXM 2-GPU pod (~5 min)
torchrun-equivalent: launch hxnccl_smoke twice (rank 0, rank 1) sharing /tmp/hxccl_uid_2 (~10 sec)
Verify both ranks return 0 from init_world + barrier + destroy
two_rank_smoke_eta_and_cost.blocking_question_for_owner: Approve pod spin for 2-rank live verify? (Within feedback_h100_authorized 2-pod cap; pods 87xsc + hhz are EXITED.)

compliance.hexa_first_evidence: Authored .c (hxnccl.c, smoke.c) + .txt (CMakeLists) + .hexa (rewrote nccl_ffi.hexa) + .json (this state). No .py / .rs / .sh authored.
compliance.h100_evidence: No new pod spun for 2-rank live test; compile/syntax/ABI verified locally on Mac instead.
compliance.no_version_evidence: lib/hxnccl/{hxnccl.c, CMakeLists.txt, smoke.c} — no v2 / v3 in any filename.
compliance.troubleshoot_evidence: Mac stub Family A global init bug found during smoke (world_size/rank returned 0/-1) + fix recorded inline in hxccl_linux.c hxccl_init_handle Mac branch.

next_steps.description: Wire nccl_broadcast_layer + nccl_reduce_scatter_layer to actually call hxnccl_broadcast_f32 / hxnccl_allreduce_f32 against fsdp_shard layer device pointers.
Optional but recommended: 30-min H100 SXM 2-GPU smoke to verify ncclCommInitRank file-rendezvous + ncclAllReduce barrier on real hardware before r12 launch.
After B2: r12 fresh-from-step-0 launch on H100 SXM 2-GPU, FULL_SHARD + Qwen2DecoderLayer wrap + BACKWARD_PRE prefetch + SHARDED_STATE_DICT + NCCL_P2P_LEVEL=NVL.

cites: self/native/hxccl_linux.c (MODIFIED, +131 LOC for HXCCL_NCCL Day-2 path)
training/nccl_ffi.hexa (REWRITTEN, hxnccl extern + nccl_init/barrier/shutdown route through libhxnccl)
